description: Redesign the strategies page and strategy detail page with distinctive Terminal-inspired UI. Transform generic strategy cards into visually memorable 'Playbook' cards with terminal chrome, performance-based styling, and clear visual hierarchy. Create a proper strategy detail/view page that presents playbooks as professional documents. Purely frontend work - no backend changes.

userStories.title: Redesign Strategy List Page Header
userStories.description: As a trader, I want a more impactful page header so that the strategies section feels like a dedicated command center.
acceptanceCriteria: Add atmospheric background effects (grid pattern, gradient orbs) to the strategies page
Section label with command prompt character: '$ PLAYBOOKS'
Larger, bolder headline with accent color on key word
Subheadline in monospace describing the purpose
'New Strategy' button follows Terminal button pattern (uppercase, tracking-wider)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser: header is visually striking
userStories.notes: Implemented hero header with background effects (grid, gradient orbs), command prompt label, accent headline, and terminal-style New Playbook button

userStories.title: Create Performance Leaderboard Component
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to see my top-performing strategies prominently displayed so that I can quickly identify what's working.
acceptanceCriteria: New StrategyLeaderboard component in src/components/strategy/strategy-leaderboard.tsx
Replace existing PerformanceComparisonTable with new leaderboard
Terminal window chrome (traffic light dots, title bar)
Top 3 strategies displayed as 'podium' with rank indicators (1st, 2nd, 3rd with styling)
Each entry shows: rank, strategy name with color dot, total P&L, win rate
Highlighted border on the #1 strategy (primary color glow)
Falls back gracefully when fewer than 3 strategies have trades
Monospace fonts throughout
Export from src/components/strategy/index.ts
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser: leaderboard is eye-catching

userStories.title: Redesign Strategy Card Component
userStories.description: As a trader, I want strategy cards that are visually distinctive and show their identity clearly so that I can quickly scan my playbooks.
acceptanceCriteria: Terminal window chrome at top of each card (3 dots: red, yellow, green)
Title bar shows strategy name in monospace
Color block or gradient header area using strategy color
Status indicator: pulsing green dot for active, dim for inactive
Stats displayed in a grid with micro-labels (uppercase, tracking-wider)
P&L prominently displayed with profit/loss coloring
Rule count shown as 'X RULES DEFINED'
Hover state: border glow matching strategy color
Dropdown menu positioned to not obstruct the design
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser: cards are distinctive and scannable

userStories.title: Add Strategy Card Visual Variants
userStories.description: As a trader, I want visual differentiation between high-performing and underperforming strategies so that I can spot patterns at a glance.
acceptanceCriteria: Strategies with positive P&L get subtle profit-colored border accent
Strategies with negative P&L get subtle loss-colored border accent
Top performer (if any trades) gets highlighted treatment (primary border, slight glow)
Strategies with no trades yet show 'NO TRADES YET' badge
Inactive strategies are visually muted (lower opacity, no glow effects)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser: can visually distinguish strategy performance

userStories.title: Improve Strategy List Grid Layout
userStories.description: As a trader, I want a better organized grid that adapts to my number of strategies so that the page doesn't feel empty or cramped.
acceptanceCriteria: Responsive grid: 1 col mobile, 2 col tablet, 3 col desktop
If only 1-2 strategies, cards take more space and look good
'Create Strategy' CTA card appears at the end of the grid (dashed border, + icon)
Staggered fade-in animation on page load using CSS
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser: grid adapts nicely to different amounts of content

userStories.title: Redesign Empty State
userStories.description: As a new trader, I want an inspiring empty state so that I'm motivated to create my first strategy.
acceptanceCriteria: Terminal-style empty state with command prompt aesthetic
Icon representing a playbook/strategy (BookMarked or custom)
Message: 'No playbooks defined' with subtext about creating your first
Prominent CTA button: '$ CREATE FIRST PLAYBOOK'
Subtle background effect (grid pattern visible)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser: empty state is engaging and motivating

userStories.title: Create Strategy Detail Page Layout
userStories.description: As a trader, I want a dedicated strategy detail page that presents my playbook as a professional document so that I can review and refine my approach.
acceptanceCriteria: Restructure /strategies/[id]/page.tsx layout for view-first experience
Hero section with strategy color as gradient background at top
Terminal window chrome wrapping the hero content
Large strategy name prominently displayed
Status badge (ACTIVE/INACTIVE) with pulsing indicator for active
Quick stats row: Trades, Win Rate, Total P&L, Profit Factor displayed prominently
'Edit Playbook' button that shows the form in a modal or scrolls to form section
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser: page feels like viewing a playbook document

userStories.title: Strategy Detail - Rules Display Section
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to see my strategy rules displayed beautifully so that I can review my checklist at a glance.
acceptanceCriteria: New StrategyRulesDisplay component in src/components/strategy/strategy-rules-display.tsx
Rules grouped by category (Entry, Exit, Risk, Management)
Each category in its own terminal-style card with header
Rules displayed as checklist items (visual only, not interactive)
Category icons or indicators (→ for Entry, etc.)
Rule count shown per category
Empty categories show 'No rules defined' placeholder
Export from src/components/strategy/index.ts
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser: rules are easy to scan

userStories.title: Strategy Detail - Entry/Exit Criteria Display
userStories.description: As a trader, I want my entry and exit criteria displayed prominently so that I can quickly review my trading logic.
acceptanceCriteria: Two-column layout for Entry and Exit criteria (stacked on mobile)
Each in a terminal-style card with header
Command prompt prefix on section headers ('> ENTRY CRITERIA', '> EXIT RULES')
Text displayed in monospace with proper line breaks preserved
'Not defined' placeholder text if criteria is empty
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser: criteria are readable and well-formatted

userStories.title: Strategy Detail - Risk Parameters Display
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to see my risk parameters displayed clearly so that I understand my risk management at a glance.
acceptanceCriteria: New StrategyRiskDisplay component in src/components/strategy/strategy-risk-display.tsx
Terminal-style card for risk parameters section
Grid of key values: Position Sizing Method, Max Risk per Trade, Daily Loss Limit, Max Concurrent Positions, Min R:R Ratio
Each value in its own cell with micro-label above and large value below
Values formatted appropriately (percentages with %, currency with $, ratios as X.X)
'Risk parameters not configured' placeholder if riskParameters is null
Export from src/components/strategy/index.ts
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser: risk params are clear and scannable

userStories.title: Strategy Detail - Placeholder Sections
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to see where future features will go so that I understand the platform's potential.
acceptanceCriteria: New StrategyPlaceholder component in src/components/strategy/strategy-placeholder.tsx
'Equity Curve' placeholder section with mock mini-chart outline/icon
'Recent Trades' placeholder section with list icon
Both placeholders show 'COMING SOON' badge in accent color
Placeholders use dashed borders and muted styling
Each shows descriptive text about what will appear there
Export from src/components/strategy/index.ts
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser: placeholders are informative, not confusing

userStories.title: Strategy Detail - Action Bar
userStories.description: As a trader, I want quick access to actions from the strategy detail page so that I can manage my playbook efficiently.
acceptanceCriteria: Action bar at top of page with back button and action buttons
Actions: Edit (opens form), Duplicate, Delete
Buttons follow Terminal design (monospace, uppercase, tracking-wider)
Delete opens confirmation dialog before deleting
Back button returns to /strategies list
Buttons are appropriately sized for mobile (min 44px touch targets)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser: actions are accessible and work correctly

userStories.title: Add Page Transitions and Animations
userStories.description: As a trader, I want smooth transitions when navigating strategies so that the experience feels polished.
acceptanceCriteria: Cards fade in with staggered delay on strategies list page load
Strategy detail page content sections fade in sequentially
Hover effects on interactive elements (cards get subtle glow)
Loading skeletons updated to match new card design shapes
Animations are subtle and quick (200-300ms durations)
Respects prefers-reduced-motion media query
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser: animations enhance but don't impede usability

userStories.title: Mobile Optimization Pass
userStories.description: As a mobile trader, I want the redesigned pages to work perfectly on my phone so that I can review strategies on the go.
acceptanceCriteria: All components render correctly on mobile viewport (375px width)
Touch targets are at least 44x44px on all interactive elements
Cards stack in single column on mobile
Terminal chrome elements scale down appropriately
Leaderboard adapts to vertical/compact layout on mobile
No horizontal scrolling required at any viewport
Strategy detail page sections stack nicely on mobile
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify on mobile viewport: everything is usable and readable

userStories.title: E2E Tests for Strategies Redesign
userStories.description: As a developer, I want E2E tests for the redesigned strategies pages so that we can verify the UI works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test file created: tests/e2e/strategies-redesign.spec.ts
Test strategies list page renders with header, leaderboard section, cards grid
Test strategy card shows terminal chrome and stats
Test strategy detail page loads and displays hero, rules, criteria sections
Test navigation from list to detail and back
Test empty state displays when no strategies exist
All new UI elements have data-testid attributes
All tests pass (bun run test:e2e)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
